comment.body:
Turned 2500 into 90k today trading NDX ,, what a day ! 

I knew this was coming ! 
For me, there were three main reasons why I thought  it’s gonna pull back significantly.

1.  SPX was at the top of a significant channel going back three years.
2.  The VIX was getting stronger and stronger. There was actually quite a bit of strength on it on the weekly chart. And on the daily chart, the 20 and 50 EMA were about to bull cross
3.  The SPX has never gone 22 weeks or more above the 20 EMA on the weekly chart without a significant pullback.

For that reason, I felt like all the stars were aligning for a significant pullback.   I actually think we might see spy 640 this by the end of the month.  But I guess tomorrow will tell more about the story. If bulls can push and hold 655

comment.body: vol funds leverage when some RV : IV ratio is met (there is a writeup from alma on this somewhere i don't access to atm). But basically because RV has been so low for so long vol funds will buy equities aggressively. When RV then starts to rise that leverage then flips on itself as they de-leverage so the same forces that were assisting the rally then start assisting the selloff. Doesn't mean theres a crash, its more the "rubber band" snapping until liquidity is found. Fiunds are positioned at 635, 620 and 600 (600 is probably the absolute low if we even et threre)
comment.raw_body: vol funds leverage when some RV : IV ratio is met (there is a writeup from alma on this somewhere i don't access to atm).
